target_distribution: Compressed hours=34;Core hours=40;Flexitime with accrual=51;Annualised hours=22;None=derived
source: CIPD Flexible & Hybrid Working 2023, employer survey n=2,005, Fig 1
note: Flexitime 51%, compressed 34%, annualised 22% are direct employer-offer rates. "Core hours" not separately surveyed by CIPD -> held at conservative 40 (between flexitime and compressed, plausible). "None" derived as residual (org offering no listed pattern). Exclusive-terminal rule: None never co-occurs with a substantive pick.

target_distribution: Never counter=35;Case-by-case with approval=40;Routinely counter=13;No policy=12
note: 40% counter in last 12mo but only 22% have a FORMAL policy. Mapping: "Routinely counter" (formalised routine) capped ~13, "Case-by-case with approval" ~40 absorbs the informal-but-happens bulk, "Never" ~35, "No policy" ~12. Sums 100. Prior seed overstated formality.

target_distribution: Ethnicity pay gap published=18;Disability pay gap published=12;CEO pay ratio (voluntary)=8;None=derived
note: Question asks PUBLISH not analyse. Ethnicity: 40% analyse but only 18% share w/ employees -> 18. Disability report 27% conducted, publishing lower -> ~12. CEO ratio voluntary ~8 (not in PPT, conservative). PPT base is large employers; Lumi cohort skews large so applicable. None derived residual.
